meta.title: AI World Cup 2026 — Live Re-Forecast
meta.eloRule: FIFA SUM: P' = P + I·(W − We), divisor 600; W/D/L 1/0.5/0, shootout 0.75/0.25.
meta.method: A re-run of the same honest, seeded Monte Carlo — now CONDITIONAL on real results. Every finished match is clamped to its real scoreline (the sim reproduces it and re-simulates only the unknown remainder), and team ratings are updated on the pitch by FIFA's own SUM formula (divisor 600). At zero games played this reproduces the frozen pre-tournament forecast exactly. Per-match odds are closed-form from the same Poisson model — no separate model, no hand-tuning. Neutral venue (no host advantage). Field rank is 1–48 within this field.
